documentation.description:
This public instance is a necessary evil to re-expose type-changing
operators here:

Generic reduction, from a starting value and applying Reduce_Fn to each
incoming element.

tagged_types.name: Chain
tagged_types.code: type Chain is new Operators.Chain with null record;

access_types.name: Const_Apply
access_types.code: type Const_Apply is access procedure (Element : Any_Element);

documentation.description:
These named access types allow having two For_Each with the same name.
Otherwise, the "in out" is not enough to avoid the name clash.

access_types.name: Reduce_Fn_Access
access_types.code:
type Reduce_Fn_Access is
  access function (L, R : Any_Element) return Any_Element;

documentation.description:
Generic reduction, from a starting value and applying Reduce_Fn to each
incoming element.

access_types.name: Var_Apply
access_types.code: type Var_Apply   is access procedure (Element : in out Any_Element);

documentation.description:
These named access types allow having two For_Each with the same name.
Otherwise, the "in out" is not enough to avoid the name clash.

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code: function Append (Element : Any_Element) return Operator'Class

documentation.description: Add an element to the previous iterator sequence.

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code: function Append (L : Iterator'Class; R : Any_Element) return Iterator'Class

documentation.description: Add an element to the previous iterator sequence.

subprograms.name: Collect
subprograms.code: function Collect return List

subprograms.name: Collect
subprograms.code: function Collect (It : Iterator'Class) return List

subprograms.name: Collect
subprograms.code: function Collect (L : Iterator'Class; R : List) return List

subprograms.name: Continue
subprograms.code:
procedure Continue (This : in out Chain;
                    Last :        Operators.Operator'Class)

subprograms.name: Copy
subprograms.code: function Copy return Operator'Class

documentation.description:
Copies the preceding iterator, so it is not consumed by subsequent
operators.

subprograms.name: Copy
subprograms.code: procedure Copy (This : in out Chain)

subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code: function Count return Counter

subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code: function Count (It : Iterator'Class) return Natural

subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code: function Count (L : Iterator'Class; R : Counter) return Natural

subprograms.name: Empty
subprograms.code: function Empty return Iterator'Class

subprograms.name: Filter
subprograms.code:
function Filter
  (Tester : access function (Element : Any_Element) return Boolean)
   return Operator'Class

documentation.description: Let only pass elements accepted by the function argument.

subprograms.name: Filter
Flat_Map
Flat_Map
For_Each
For_Each

documentation.description:
Although Iter is mode "in", to allow direct application to a returned
chain (e.g., A & B), the actual writability depends on the root iterator
being created with Iter and not Const_Iter. Otherwise, this will be
detected at runtime.

subprograms.name: Just
subprograms.code: function Just (Element : Any_Element) return Iterator'Class

documentation.description: Convert an element into an iterator for use as start of a sequence.

subprograms.name: Last
subprograms.code: function Last return Operator'Class

subprograms.name: Map
Map
Next
subprograms.code: function Next (This : in out Chain) return Cursor'Class

subprograms.code: function No_Op return Operator'Class

subprograms.code: procedure No_Op (This : in out Chain)

documentation.description:
Generic reduction, from a starting value and applying Reduce_Fn to each
incoming element.

subprograms.code: function Reduce (L : Iterator'Class; R : Reducer) return Any_Element

documentation.description:
Generic reduction, from a starting value and applying Reduce_Fn to each
incoming element.

subprograms.name: Scan
subprograms.code:
function Scan (Initial : Any_Element;
               Scan_Fn : not null access function (L, R : Any_Element)
                                                   return Any_Element)
               return Operator'Class

subprograms.code: function Take (At_Most : Natural) return Operator'Class

generic_instantiations.name: Operators
generic_instantiations.code: package Operators is new Iterators.Operators (Root, Root);

documentation.description:
Expose here the linking operators for Operators and Reducers. This is
an "use"-intended package.
